creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
At Mon, 29 Oct 2001 20:35:22 -0800 (PST),
Marc Unangst wrote:
> pkgtools-20011030 uses the SCRIPTS variable in bin/Makefile, which
> isn't supported in all versions of FreeBSD.  This causes an install
> failure, because none of the programs identified in SCRIPTS
> are copied to /usr/local/sbin.

Ah, indeed.  Although ports-current doesn't necessarily support
versions other than the latest STABLE, CURRENT and reasonably the
latest release, I'd like to support older versions.

> The port needs to patch the makefile to allow installation on older
> systems.

Does this patch work?  After doing `make extract', apply it with
`patch -I' in the working source directory.

Index: Makefile.compat
===================================================================
RCS file: Makefile.compat
diff -N Makefile.compat
--- /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
+++ Makefile.compat	30 Oct 2001 10:28:50 -0000
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+# $Idaemons$
+
+.if defined(SCRIPTS) && !empty(SCRIPTS) && !target(_scriptsinstall)
+
+all: ${SCRIPTS}
+
+realinstall: _scriptsinstall
+
+SCRIPTSDIR?=	${BINDIR}
+SCRIPTSOWN?=	${BINOWN}
+SCRIPTSGRP?=	${BINGRP}
+SCRIPTSMODE?=	${BINMODE}
+
+.for script in ${SCRIPTS}
+.if defined(SCRIPTSNAME)
+SCRIPTSNAME_${script:T}?=	${SCRIPTSNAME}
+.else
+SCRIPTSNAME_${script:T}?=	${script:T:R}
+.endif
+SCRIPTSDIR_${script:T}?=	${SCRIPTSDIR}
+SCRIPTSOWN_${script:T}?=	${SCRIPTSOWN}
+SCRIPTSGRP_${script:T}?=	${SCRIPTSGRP}
+SCRIPTSMODE_${script:T}?=	${SCRIPTSMODE}
+_scriptsinstall: SCRIPTSINS_${script:T}
+SCRIPTSINS_${script:T}: ${script}
+	${INSTALL} ${COPY} -o ${SCRIPTSOWN_${.ALLSRC:T}} \
+	    -g ${SCRIPTSGRP_${.ALLSRC:T}} -m ${SCRIPTSMODE_${.ALLSRC:T}} \
+	    ${_INSTALLFLAGS} ${.ALLSRC} \
+	    ${DESTDIR}${SCRIPTSDIR_${.ALLSRC:T}}/${SCRIPTSNAME_${.ALLSRC:T}}
+.endfor
+
+.endif
Index: bin/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/cvs/pkgtools/bin/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.3
diff -u -r1.3 Makefile
--- bin/Makefile	29 Oct 2001 18:57:52 -0000	1.3
+++ bin/Makefile	30 Oct 2001 10:26:24 -0000
@@ -34,3 +34,5 @@
 		portsdb.1	ports_glob.1
 
 .include <bsd.prog.mk>
+
+.include "${.CURDIR}/../Makefile.compat"
Index: etc/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/cvs/pkgtools/etc/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.1
diff -u -r1.1 Makefile
--- etc/Makefile	29 Oct 2001 18:02:47 -0000	1.1
+++ etc/Makefile	30 Oct 2001 10:30:18 -0000
@@ -16,3 +16,5 @@
 .endfor
 
 .include <bsd.prog.mk>
+
+.include "${.CURDIR}/../Makefile.compat"
